name: Clawvisor
description: Connect to a Clawvisor authorization gateway. The plugin pairs itself once (receiving a bridge token) and mints per-agent tokens through a single dashboard approval.

enabled.description: Set to false to disable the plugin without removing config.

url.description: Clawvisor instance URL (cloud or self-hosted). Example: https://clawvisor.com

pairCode.description: One-time pair code generated from the Clawvisor dashboard (Agents → Connect OpenClaw). Deposited by the agent during /skill/setup-openclaw. Consumed on first boot; unused thereafter.

groupChatId.description: Fallback buffer/context ID used when no channel/conversation ID is available.

agents.description: OpenClaw agent IDs to mint Clawvisor agent tokens for on pair.
